title: Therapeutic compounds and methods
abstract: The invention provides a compound of Formula (I)-(VIII): or a salt thereof, wherein R 1 -R 2 and ring A have any of the values described in the specification, as well as compositions comprising a compound of Formula (I)-(VIII) or a salt thereof. The compounds are useful as neuroprotective agents.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS What is claimed is: 1. A compound of Formula (I)-(VIII): or a salt thereof, wherein: R 1 is H or a (C1-C6)alkyl that can optionally be substituted with one or more groups independently selected from the group consisting of halo; R 2 is a ring selected from the group consisting of 5-membered heteroaryl, 6-membered heteroaryl, 5-membered heterocycle, and 6-membered heterocycle, which 5-membered heteroaryl, 6-membered heteroaryl, 5-membered heterocycle, and 6-membered heterocycle is optionally substituted with one or more groups independently selected from the group consisting of halo, cyano, (C1-C6)alkyl that can optionally be substituted with one or more groups independently selected from the group consisting of halo, and (C1-C6)alkoxy that can optionally be substituted with one or more groups independently selected from the group consisting of halo; R 3 is H, (C 1 -C 6 )alkyl, (C 1 -C 6 )alkanoyl, (C 1 -C 6 )alkoxycarbonyl, or a hydroxy protecting group; and 

 ring A is optionally substituted with one or more groups independently selected from the group consisting of halo, hydroxy, cyano, nitro, (C1-C6)alkyl, (C1-C6)alkoxy, (C1-C6)alkanoyl, (C1-C6)alkylthio, and (C1-C6)alkoxycarbonyl, wherein any (C1-C6)alkyl, (C1-C6)alkoxy, (C1- C6)alkanoyl, (C1-C6)alkylthio, and (C1-C6)alkoxycarbonyl is optionally substituted with one or more groups independently selected from the group consisting of halo, hydroxy, cyano, nitro, (C1-C6)alkoxy, (C1-C6)alkanoyl, and (C1-C6)alkoxycarbonyl; provided the compound is not: 2. A compound of Formula (I) as described in claim 1 or a salt thereof. 3. A compound of Formula (I) as described in claim 1 or a salt thereof, wherein: R 1 is H or a (C1-C6)alkyl that can optionally be substituted with one or more groups independently selected from halo; R 2 is a ring selected from the group consisting of 5-membered heteroaryl, 6-membered heteroaryl, 5-membered heterocycle, and 6-membered heterocycle; R 3 is H, (C1-C6)alkyl, (C1-C6)alkanoyl, (C1-C6)alkoxycarbonyl, or a hydroxy protecting group (e.g., trimethylsilyl or tert-butyl-dimethylsilyl); and ring A is optionally substituted with one or more groups independently selected from the group consisting of halo, hydroxy, cyano, nitro, (C1-C6)alkyl, (C1-C6)alkoxy, (C1-C6)alkanoyl, (C1-C6)alkylthio, and (C1-C6)alkoxycarbonyl, wherein any (C1-C6)alkyl, (C1-C6)alkoxy, (C1- C6)alkanoyl, (C1-C6)alkylthio, and (C1-C6)alkoxycarbonyl is optionally substituted with one or more groups independently selected from the group consisting of halo, hydroxy, cyano, nitro, (C1-C6)alkoxy, (C1-C6)alkanoyl, and (C1-C6)alkoxycarbonyl. 4. A compound of Formula (II) as described in claim 1 or a salt thereof. 5. A compound of Formula (III) as described in claim 1 or a salt thereof. 6. A compound of Formula (IV) as described in claim 1 or a salt thereof. 7. A compound of Formula (V) as described in claim 1 or a salt thereof. 8. A compound of Formula (VI) as described in claim 1 or a salt thereof. 9. A compound of Formula (VII) as described in claim 1 or a salt thereof. 10. A compound of Formula (VIII) as described in claim 1 or a salt thereof. 11. The compound or salt of any one of claims 1-3, wherein R 1 is (C1-C6)alkyl that can optionally be substituted with one or more groups independently selected from halo. 12. The compound or salt of any one of claims 1-3, wherein R 1 is (C1-C6)alkyl. 13. The compound or salt of any one of claims 1-3, wherein R 1 is methyl. 14. The compound or salt of any one of claims 1-13, R 2 is a ring selected from the group consisting of pyrazinyl, thienyl, thiazolyl, furyl, and tetrahydrofuryl. 15. The compound or salt of any one of claims 1-13, R 2 is a furyl ring. 16. The compound or salt of any one of claims 1-13, R 2 is a 2-furyl ring. 17. The compound or salt of any one of claims 1-13, R 2 is a 3-furyl ring. 18. The compound or salt of any one of claims 1-17, wherein the ring A is substituted with one or more groups. 19. The compound or salt of any one of claims 1-17, wherein the ring A is not substituted with one or more groups. 20. The compound or salt of claim 1, which is a compound of the following formula: or a salt thereof. 21. The compound or salt of claim 1, which is a compound of the following formula: or a salt thereof. 2 The compound or salt of claim 1, which is a compound of the following formula: or a salt thereof. 23. The compound or salt of claim 1, which is a compound of the following formula: or a salt thereof. 24. The compound or salt of claim 1, which is a compound of the following formula: or a salt thereof. 25. A pharmaceutical composition comprising a compound of Formula (I)-(VIII): or a pharmaceutically acceptable salt thereof, wherein: R 1 is H or a (C1-C6)alkyl that can optionally be substituted with one or more groups independently selected from the group consisting of halo; R 2 is a ring selected from the group consisting of 5-membered heteroaryl, 6-membered heteroaryl, 5-membered heterocycle, and 6-membered heterocycle, which 5-membered heteroaryl, 6-membered heteroaryl, 5-membered heterocycle, and 6-membered heterocycle is optionally substituted with one or more groups independently selected from the group consisting of halo, cyano, (C1-C6)alkyl that can optionally be substituted with one or more groups independently selected from the group consisting of halo, and (C1-C6)alkoxy that can optionally be substituted with one or more groups independently selected from the group consisting of 

halo; R 3 is H, (C1-C6)alkyl, (C1-C6)alkanoyl, (C1-C6)alkoxycarbonyl, or a hydroxy protecting group; and ring A is optionally substituted with one or more groups independently selected from the group consisting of halo, hydroxy, cyano, nitro, (C1-C6)alkyl, (C1-C6)alkoxy, (C1-C6)alkanoyl, (C1-C6)alkylthio, and (C1-C6)alkoxycarbonyl, wherein any (C1-C6)alkyl, (C1-C6)alkoxy, (C1- C6)alkanoyl, (C1-C6)alkylthio, and (C1-C6)alkoxycarbonyl is optionally substituted with one or more groups independently selected from the group consisting of halo, hydroxy, cyano, nitro, (C1-C6)alkoxy, (C1-C6)alkanoyl, and (C1-C6)alkoxycarbonyl; and a pharmaceutically acceptable excipient. 26. A pharmaceutical composition comprising a compound as described in any one of claims 1-24 or a pharmaceuticallly acceptable salt thereof and a pharmaceutically acceptable excipient. 27. A method for producing a neuroprotective effect in an animal comprising administering a compound as described in any one of claims 1-25 or a pharmaceutically acceptable salt thereof to the animal. 28. A method for producing neuroprotective activity against Glu excitotoxicity or oxidative stress in an animal comprising administering a compound as described in any one of claims 1-25 or a pharmaceuticallly acceptable salt thereof to the animal. 29. A method for treating multiple sclerosis, psoriasis, ALS, subarachnoid hemorrhage, Parkinsonâs disease, Alzheimerâs disease, or Friedreich Ataxia in an animal comprising administering a compound as described in any one of claims 1-25 or a pharmaceuticallly acceptable salt thereof to the animal. 30. A method to mitigate damage from chemical exposure in an animal comprising administering a compound as described in any one of claims 1-25 or a pharmaceuticallly acceptable salt thereof to the animal prophylactically or post exposure. 31. A compound as described in any one of claims 1-25 or a pharmaceuticallly acceptable salt thereof to produce a neuroprotective effect in an animal. 32. A compound as described in any one of claims 1-25 or a pharmaceuticallly acceptable salt thereof to produce neuroprotective activity against Glu excitotoxicity or oxidative stress. 33. A compound as described in any one of claims 1-25 or a pharmaceuticallly acceptable salt thereof for treating multiple sclerosis, psoriasis, ALS, subarachnoid hemorrhage, Parkinsonâs disease, Alzheimerâs disease, or Friedreich Ataxia. 34. A compound as described in any one of claims 1-25 or a pharmaceuticallly acceptable salt thereof to mitigate damage from chemical exposure prophylactically or post exposure. 35. The use of a compound as described in any one of claims 1-25 or a pharmaceuticallly acceptable salt thereof to prepare a medicament useful to produce a neuroprotective effect in an animal. 36. The use of a compound as described in any one of claims 1-25 or a pharmaceuticallly acceptable salt thereof to prepare a medicament useful to produce neuroprotective activity against Glu excitotoxicity or oxidative stress in an animal. 37. The use of a compound as described in any one of claims 1-25 or a pharmaceuticallly acceptable salt thereof to prepare a medicament useful for treating multiple sclerosis, psoriasis, ALS, subarachnoid hemorrhage, Parkinsonâs disease, Alzheimerâs disease, or Friedreich Ataxia in an animal. 38. The use of a compound as described in any one of claims 1-25 or a pharmaceuticallly acceptable salt thereof to prepare a medicament useful to mitigate damage from chemical exposure in an animal prophylactically or post exposure. 39. A method to produce neuroprotective activity in an animal comprising activating Nrf2 without a covalent thio-modification. 40. A method to produce neuroprotective activity in an animal comprising activating Nrf2 with an agent that is not an electrophile. 41. A method to activate Nrf2 in a cell comprising contacting the cell with a compound as described in any one of claims 1-25 or a salt thereof. 42. A method comprising, activating Nrf2 in a cell by contacting the cell with a Nrf2 activating agent that is not an electrophile.
